text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One evening, on a visit to the training track...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: What a workout! Thanks for running with me, Spe!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Spe? Earth to Speeee?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Aaaah! S-sorry! Hokkaido potatoes really are
crisp and delicious!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...I didn't ask, but sure. Sigh... Come here for a sec.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: What's the matter? You seem really out of it.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: A... ahaha... Is it that obvious? Well...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
There's something I want to do, but there's no
way I can do it alone.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...So, it's been weighin' on ya? Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Hehe, fine! I'll lend ya my services, then!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I can't even start to guess what's eatin' at you, but
I'm game for anything!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Huh? I couldn't possibly! You're busy with your
own stuff, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
It's fine! My dad told me a long time ago that
whenever I needed to decide somethin', I should
always follow my heart.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: No matter what anyone else says, trust yourself, he'd say. "You should pick what excites you! "

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
And right now, I wanna see how you challenge
yourself! That's what sounds exciting to me!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Vodka! Th-thank you! That's such good
advice!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'm going to take on the challenge. Please
help me out, Vodka!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Mega Max Carrot Ramen Set for Two, here we
come!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
What?! You've been worryin' about food this
whole time?! You really are a foodie, aren'tcha?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But I did say I'd help. It'd be super lame if I
backed out now! All right, you're on!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka and Special Week rush off excitedly to a
Chinese restaurant.
